summary: Iteration 116: 21-Day Ops Forecast + Group Resume Builder + BEO Templates fully tested. Backend: 19/19 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: All features verified working - Ops Forecast panel with 6 views (Excel Grid, Charts, Room States, Outlet Forecast, Group Blocks, AI Trends), Group Resume Builder with eClinical Works sample showing all 13 sections, BEO Templates save/load/delete.
critical_code_review_comments: 21-Day Ops Forecast data is hardcoded from Excel upload - 331 rooms, 21 days (Apr 13 - May 3), 15 group blocks
Forecast includes real data: F1 Miami weekend (May 1-3) with ADR spike to $665 avg, eClinical Works (64 rooms, 325 attendees)
Room States view calculates HK staff needed based on rooms_to_flip / 14 rooms per housekeeper
Outlet Forecast uses capture rates: Signature Italian 12%, Rooftop Lounge 25%, Pool Bar 30%, Family Dining 15%, IRD 18%
AI Trends generates insights for F1 weekend, low occupancy days, premium ADR days, group-dominated midweek
Group Resume Builder has 13 sections with eClinical Works sample seeded via POST /api/group-resume/seed-sample
BEO Templates support save/load/delete with use_count tracking
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
seed_data_creation: Group Resume sample seeded via POST /api/group-resume/seed-sample (eClinical Works Enterprise Summit). Ops Forecast data is hardcoded from Excel upload.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 116 tested 21-Day Ops Forecast (Financial & Purchasing > Ops Forecast), Group Resume Builder (Events & Catering > Group Resume), and BEO Templates. All backend APIs working. Ops Forecast has 6 views: grid (Excel-style 16 rows x 21 days), graph (3 charts), rooms (21 room state cards), outlets (outlet revenue table), groups (15 group blocks), trends (AI insights + DOW patterns). Group Resume shows eClinical Works sample with all 13 sections including VIPs, room blocks, schedule of events. BEO Templates save/load/delete working.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/ops-forecast/21-day - returns 21 days with capacity 331 - PASSED
GET /api/ops-forecast/summary - returns period stats (avg_occ, avg_adr, total_revenue, group_mix_pct) - PASSED
GET /api/ops-forecast/groups - returns 15 groups with total room nights - PASSED
GET /api/ops-forecast/room-states - returns room state data per day - PASSED
GET /api/ops-forecast/outlet-forecast - returns outlet revenue/covers forecast - PASSED
GET /api/ops-forecast/trends - returns AI insights, DOW patterns, revenue trend - PASSED
POST /api/group-resume/seed-sample - seeds eClinical Works resume - PASSED
GET /api/group-resume/gr-eclinical-sample - returns full resume with 13 sections - PASSED
frontend_ui_tests: 21-Day Ops Forecast panel opens via Financial & Purchasing > Ops Forecast - PASSED
Panel has 6 views: Excel Grid, Charts, Room States, Outlet Forecast, Group Blocks, AI Trends - PASSED
Excel Grid view shows 16 rows of metrics across 21 days with totals column - PASSED
Charts view shows Occupancy & Revenue, Group vs Transient Mix & ADR, Guest Count & Daily Spend - PASSED
Room States view shows 21 room state cards with occupancy bars and HK staff needed - PASSED
Outlet Forecast view shows outlet revenue/covers table with anticipated daily spend - PASSED
Group Blocks view shows 15 groups including F1 Miami, eClinical Works, Pirelli F1 - PASSED
AI Trends view shows insights, Revenue Trend (+51.4%), Peak Day, Valley Day, Group Mix, DOW Patterns - PASSED
Group Resume Builder panel opens via Events & Catering > Group Resume - PASSED
Resume list shows eClinical Works sample with CONFIRMED status - PASSED

Resume detail view shows all sections: Meeting Details, Contact Info, Group Profile, VIP Info, Room Blocks, F&B, Schedule, AV, Transportation, Billing, Security, Housekeeping, Special Instructions - PASSED
VIP section shows 4 VIPs with room types and rates - PASSED

mocked_apis.note: AI assist endpoint may return graceful error without EMERGENT_LLM_KEY but all other features work. Ops Forecast data is hardcoded from Excel upload.
